mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant (id, code, name, status, org_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{status}, #{orgId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM tenant WHERE id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant_db_config c ON c.tenant_id = t.id WHERE (#{keyword} = '' OR t.id LIKE #{like} OR t.code LIKE #{like} OR t.name LIKE #{like})

SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.code, t.name, t.status, t.org_id AS orgId, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime, c.db_name AS dbName, c.jdbc_url AS jdbcUrl, c.enabled FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant_db_config c ON c.tenant_id = t.id WHERE (#{keyword} = '' OR t.id LIKE #{like} OR t.code LIKE #{like} OR t.name LIKE #{like}) ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.code, t.name, t.status, t.org_id AS orgId, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime, c.db_name AS dbName, c.jdbc_url AS jdbcUrl, c.enabled FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant_db_config c ON c.tenant_id = t.id WHERE t.id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
